description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make a slick style statement with this maxima Aqua watch - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to pep-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Black square plastic caseDial style: Luminous dial with black indicies and black handsStraps type: Black synthetic strap with tang claspWater resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashesWarranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 30 mm Case thickness: 3 mm
